SafeRamp ≤10%/wkWet-bulb heat safetyACWR injury radarAdaptive feedback loop£0 · no backend
Why Strivon

Most apps optimise for a plan. Strivon optimises so the plan won't injure you.

🛡️

SafeRamp

Your plan mathematically cannot ramp more than 10% a week, with deloads built in. Unsafe training is impossible by design.

🎯

Injury-risk radar

A live ACWR gauge (the sports-science load ratio) that stays in the safe band every week — most apps don't model this at all.

🌡️

Wet-bulb heat safety

Reads your local weather and scores heat stress by wet-bulb — then tells you the best time to run and warns you when it's dangerous.

🔁

Adaptive feedback loop

A daily readiness check and post-run effort rating quietly reshape tomorrow — it reacts to your body, not a one-time form.

🗺️

Live map + heart rate

Real GPS route on a dark map, smart auto-pause, and Bluetooth heart-rate zones. No corner-cutting, no nagging at red lights.

📚

Learn as you run

Short coaching lessons on form, pacing and injury prevention play on easy runs — finish knowing how to run better and safer.

Run-safety, by the weather

The app changes colour with the conditions

Scored on wet-bulb temperature — heat and humidity. Teal means it's perfect out. Red means stay in.
